field.label: Write to File
field.help: Write query log entries to a file for persistence across restarts.

field.label: Retention Period (hours)
field.help: How long to keep query log entries before they are automatically deleted, in hours.

field.label: Memory Buffer Size
field.help: Number of query log entries to keep in memory for fast access.

field.label: Ignored Domains
field.help: Domains to exclude from the query log. Type a domain and press Enter to add.
